next_focus: Production launch data is sufficient and VIP checkout customer identity is fixed: phone-only Marathon participants use validated Auth token contact data for checkout, production-safe payment/gift/winner/NPS smoke passes, readiness and public journey are green, registration remains open, and TASK-MAR-064 audit:data-hygiene is deployed for non-blocking legacy data hygiene review.
follow_ups: Use a unique image tag or no-cache build when deploying uncommitted remote changes; reusing the git short SHA tag can leave Kubernetes on stale image content.
